data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the implementation of rate limiting per integration partner.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to rate limiting per integration partner. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or examples that demonstrate how rate limiting is implemented or enforced within the system. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or enforcement of rate limiting per integration partner.
